name: @veritas-nx/source
description: Open-source narrative-intelligence OSINT platform — tracks how the same story diverges across state media, public broadcasters, and independent outlets, with evidence-grounded verification and auditable provenance. Sees who says what; doesn't decide what's true.

scripts.test: env -u NO_COLOR NX_DAEMON=false NODE_OPTIONS=--require=./scripts/test-process-bootstrap.cjs node scripts/run-nx.js run-many --target=test --all --parallel=1
scripts.test:visualization: env -u NO_COLOR NX_DAEMON=false NODE_OPTIONS=--require=./scripts/test-process-bootstrap.cjs nx test visualization
scripts.test:api: env -u NO_COLOR NX_DAEMON=false NODE_OPTIONS=--require=./scripts/test-process-bootstrap.cjs nx test api
scripts.test:analysis: env -u NO_COLOR NX_DAEMON=false NODE_OPTIONS=--require=./scripts/test-process-bootstrap.cjs nx test analysis
scripts.test:types: env -u NO_COLOR NX_DAEMON=false NODE_OPTIONS=--require=./scripts/test-process-bootstrap.cjs nx test types
scripts.test:utils: env -u NO_COLOR NX_DAEMON=false NODE_OPTIONS=--require=./scripts/test-process-bootstrap.cjs nx test utils
scripts.test:data-access: env -u NO_COLOR NX_DAEMON=false NODE_OPTIONS=--require=./scripts/test-process-bootstrap.cjs nx test data-access
scripts.test:watch: env -u NO_COLOR NX_DAEMON=false NODE_OPTIONS=--require=./scripts/test-process-bootstrap.cjs node scripts/run-nx.js run-many --target=test --all --parallel=3 --watch
scripts.test:coverage: env -u NO_COLOR NX_DAEMON=false NODE_OPTIONS=--require=./scripts/test-process-bootstrap.cjs node scripts/run-nx.js run-many --target=test --all --parallel=3 --coverage
scripts.test:affected: env -u NO_COLOR NX_DAEMON=false NODE_OPTIONS=--require=./scripts/test-process-bootstrap.cjs node scripts/run-nx.js affected --target=test
scripts.clean:build: find . -type f -name "*.js" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -not -path "*/dist/*" -not -path "*/scripts/*" -not -name "jest.config.js" -not -name "jest.preset.js" -not -name "*.config.js" -delete && find . -type f -name "*.d.ts" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -not -path "*/dist/*" -not -path "*/types/*" -delete && find . -type f -name "*.js.map" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -not -path "*/dist/*" -delete && find . -type f -name "*.tsbuildinfo" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -not -path "*/dist/*" -delete
scripts.mongodb:reset: docker-compose -f docker-compose.mongodb.yml down && rm -rf ./mongodb_data && docker-compose -f docker-compose.mongodb.yml up -d
